pi_items.source: Calculated base64 size of 4M /dev/urandom stream which is 5.6MB, confirming the 5MB quota correctly enforces that all 5 large emails are permanently deleted.
setup_task.sh loads exactly 45 ham emails from the SpamAssassin corpus, allowing a buffer for 5 mistaken deletions before the verifier fails.
Checked LARGE_SUBJECTS array in setup_task.sh and export_result.sh.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for bluemail_env mailbox_storage_quota_cleanup task by confirming the normal correspondence emails originate from the SpamAssassin Public Corpus, and the large asset backups are synthetically generated to exactly ~5.6 MB each. Verified the target max size quota strictly requires permanent deletion of all 5 injected large subjects, and checked the preserved email logic allows for up to 5 mistaken deletions while preserving the remaining 40.
